---
title: "The Rev. Thomas Bargus"
---

## The Rev. Thomas Bargus

**Dates:** (d. 29 March 1809)

### Description

Vicar of Barkway, maternal grandfather of CMY

### Biography

He married first (1787), a widow with two children, Cordelia (Garstin) Colborne (d.15 March 1791) and secondly (1792) Mary Kingsman. [LG 1870 Garstin of Leragh Castle]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 26th 1899
- Letter from June 2nd 1896
- Letter from June 10th 1889
- Letter from May 3d  [1866]
- Letter from [21 March 1857]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
